meaning: n.守候活动,童子军的活动
examples: The kids were scouting around for wood for the fire.
Penguin hopes the site will attract agents, editors and publishers scouting for new talent.
On Sunday, after church, Bob drove Phyllis and the kids around Detroit, scouting out sites for the Kearns wiper factory.
Testing of a Scout's game can be done at Scouting functions such as camp outings.
No one tells a draftee which scouting events he should perform at and in what order.
